name: SAE First AI Opportunity Intake
positioning: A credential-free n8n template that qualifies AI automation leads from NexusAI.ma, Intch, WhatsApp, or partner referrals, then prepares persistence, notification, and proposal payloads.

inputs.name: problem
inputs.example: We receive many WhatsApp questions and need faster qualification before booking appointments.

shippingChecklist: Activate workflow or use test webhook mode.
Confirm the JSON response contains a qualification, persistence record, notification payload, and proposal draft.
Connect the webhook URL to NexusAI.ma, Intch follow-up forms, or a WhatsApp intake form.
Map persistenceRecord into the selected CRM or spreadsheet.
Map notification into WhatsApp, email, Slack, or Telegram for hot leads.
Send proposalDraft.aiPrompt to the preferred AI model once credentials are ready.
upgradePath: Replace connectorTargets guidance with live n8n app nodes for the chosen CRM.
Replace notification guidance with a live WhatsApp, email, Slack, or Telegram node.
Replace proposalDraft.aiPrompt with a live Claude, OpenAI, or Gemini node.
Store generated proposals against the persisted lead record.
